labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Unknown" provides 18 tools focused on e-commerce tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, deletion and cleanup, modification and updates. Key tools: list_shipments, get_shipment, search_shipments, create_shipment, cancel_shipment.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "E-Commerce" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: product, store, shipping.

tools.name: list_shipments
tools.description: List shipments with pagination and filters. Filter by status (new/created/delivered), carrier, or date range.

integration_key.description: Shipi integration key (uses env default if omitted)

status.description: Filter by status: new, created, delivered, cancelled

carrier.description: Filter by carrier: fedex, ups, dhl, usps, etc.

tools.name: get_shipment
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific shipment by ID or order ID. Includes shipper, recipient, products, tracking, and label URLs.

tools.name: search_shipments
tools.description: Search shipments by order ID or tracking number. Returns matching shipments.

q.description: Search query (order ID or tracking number)

tools.name: create_shipment
tools.description: Create a shipping label. Requires carrier account, shipper/recipient addresses, and product details. Returns tracking number and label URL.

service_code.description: Carrier service code (leave empty for default)

tools.name: cancel_shipment
tools.description: Cancel a shipment and void its label. Requires the shipment ID (del_ref).

tools.name: get_shipping_rates
tools.description: Get live shipping rates from all configured carriers. Provide recipient address and package details to compare prices across FedEx, UPS, DHL, USPS, etc.

account_id.description: Specific shipping account ID (optional, gets rates from all if omitted)

tools.name: schedule_pickup
tools.description: Schedule a carrier pickup for a shipment. The carrier will come to the shipper address to collect the package.

carrier_type.description: Carrier type: fedex, ups, dhl, etc.

tools.name: track_shipment
tools.description: Get a tracking URL for a shipment. Supports auto-detection of carrier from tracking number format.

carrier.description: Carrier code: fedex, ups, dhl, usps, etc. (auto-detected if omitted)

tools.name: fetch_labels
tools.description: Fetch shipping labels for printing. Filter by printed/unprinted status. Returns label URLs.

tools.name: list_addresses
tools.description: List all saved addresses from the address book. Filter by type (shipper/receiver).

tools.name: get_address
tools.description: Get a specific address by ID from the address book.

tools.name: add_address
tools.description: Add a new address to the address book. Used for saving shipper or receiver addresses for reuse.

tools.name: edit_address
tools.description: Update an existing address in the address book. Only changed fields need to be provided.

tools.name: delete_address
tools.description: Delete an address from the address book by ID.

tools.name: list_carriers
tools.description: List all configured shipping carrier accounts. Shows carrier type, primary status, and shipper address. Credentials are never exposed.

tools.name: get_carrier
tools.description: Get details of a specific carrier account by ID. Returns carrier type and shipper address info.

tools.name: get_account_info
tools.description: Get Shipi account information including user details, store info, billing/balance, plan, and feature flags.

tools.name: get_shipping_stats
tools.description: Get shipping statistics and analytics. View shipment counts, cost breakdowns, carrier usage, tracking status, and daily trends.

period.description: Period: today, week, month, year, all
